workouts.name: 7 Min Full Body
workouts.description: Quick full body routine to build strength and burn calories at home with no equipment.

exercises.name: Jumping Jacks
exercises.instructions: Stand tall with feet together. Jump while spreading legs and raising arms overhead. Return to start and repeat at a steady pace.

exercises.name: Push Ups
exercises.instructions: Place hands shoulder-width apart. Lower chest toward the floor, keep core tight, then push back up. Drop to knees if needed.

exercises.name: Squats
exercises.instructions: Feet hip-width apart. Push hips back and bend knees to lower down. Keep chest up and drive through heels to stand.

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.instructions: Forearms on floor, body in a straight line from head to heels. Brace core and avoid sagging hips.

exercises.name: Lunges
exercises.instructions: Step forward and lower until both knees are at 90 degrees. Push through front heel to return. Alternate legs.

exercises.name: Crunches
exercises.instructions: Lie on back, knees bent. Lift shoulders off floor using abs. Lower with control and repeat.

workouts.name: Extreme Ab Workout
workouts.description: Intense core session targeting upper abs, lower abs, and obliques.

exercises.name: Bicycle Crunch
exercises.instructions: Lie on back, hands behind head. Bring opposite elbow to knee while extending the other leg. Alternate sides smoothly.

exercises.name: Leg Raises
exercises.instructions: Lie flat, legs straight. Raise legs to 90 degrees without arching lower back. Lower slowly.

exercises.name: Russian Twist
exercises.instructions: Sit with knees bent, lean back slightly. Rotate torso side to side, touching floor beside hips.

exercises.name: Mountain Climber
exercises.instructions: High plank position. Drive knees toward chest alternately at a quick but controlled pace.

exercises.name: Plank Hold
exercises.instructions: Hold a strong plank. Squeeze glutes and keep breathing steady throughout the hold.

workouts.name: Chest Power
workouts.description: Build chest and triceps strength using bodyweight pushing movements.

exercises.name: Standard Push Up
exercises.instructions: Full range push ups with controlled tempo. Keep elbows at roughly 45 degrees from torso.

exercises.name: Wide Push Up
exercises.instructions: Hands wider than shoulders to emphasize chest. Maintain a straight body line.

exercises.name: Diamond Push Up
exercises.instructions: Hands close together forming a diamond shape. Lower chest toward hands and press up.

exercises.name: Triceps Dips
exercises.instructions: Use a chair or low surface. Lower body by bending elbows, then press back up.

workouts.name: Leg Day Burn
workouts.description: Lower body workout for quads, hamstrings, glutes, and calves.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Squat
exercises.instructions: Squat to comfortable depth with knees tracking over toes. Stand tall at the top.

exercises.name: Reverse Lunge
exercises.instructions: Step one leg back and lower into a lunge. Return to standing and switch legs.

exercises.name: Wall Sit
exercises.instructions: Back against wall, slide down until thighs are parallel to floor. Hold steady.

exercises.name: Calf Raises
exercises.instructions: Rise onto toes, pause at top, lower heels slowly. Keep balance and control.

workouts.name: Arm Sculpt
workouts.description: Tone biceps, triceps, and shoulders with no dumbbells required.

exercises.name: Arm Circles
exercises.instructions: Extend arms to sides and make small then large circles forward and backward.

exercises.name: Close Grip Push Up
exercises.instructions: Hands under chest, elbows close to body. Focus on triceps engagement.

exercises.name: Punch Combo
exercises.instructions: Alternate jabs and crosses with light footwork. Keep core engaged.

exercises.name: Shoulder Tap Plank
exercises.instructions: High plank. Tap opposite shoulder with hand while minimizing hip sway.

workouts.name: Booty Lift
workouts.description: Glute-focused routine to shape and strengthen your lower body.

exercises.name: Glute Bridge
exercises.instructions: Lie on back, feet flat. Drive hips up, squeeze glutes at top, lower with control.

exercises.name: Donkey Kick
exercises.instructions: On all fours, kick one leg back and up. Keep core stable. Switch sides halfway.

exercises.name: Fire Hydrant
exercises.instructions: On all fours, lift knee out to the side. Keep back flat and move with control.

exercises.name: Squat Pulse
exercises.instructions: Hold low squat position and pulse up and down slightly without standing fully.

workouts.name: HIIT Fat Burn
workouts.description: High intensity intervals to maximize calorie burn in minimal time.

exercises.name: Burpees
exercises.instructions: Drop to floor, chest down, jump feet in, explode up with a jump. Maintain steady rhythm.

exercises.name: High Knees
exercises.instructions: Run in place driving knees to hip height quickly. Pump arms for momentum.

exercises.name: Jump Squat
exercises.instructions: Squat down then explode upward into a jump. Land softly and repeat.

exercises.name: Speed Skater
exercises.instructions: Leap side to side landing on one foot, swinging opposite leg behind for balance.

workouts.name: Dynamic Warm Up
workouts.description: Prepare muscles and joints before training with gentle dynamic movements.

exercises.name: March in Place
exercises.instructions: March with high posture, gradually increasing pace to raise heart rate.

exercises.name: Arm Swings
exercises.instructions: Swing arms forward and backward, then cross body to loosen shoulders.

exercises.name: Hip Circles
exercises.instructions: Hands on hips, draw circles with hips clockwise then counterclockwise.

exercises.name: Leg Swings
exercises.instructions: Hold wall for balance. Swing each leg forward and back in controlled motion.

workouts.name: Cool Down Stretch
workouts.description: Stretch major muscle groups to improve flexibility and speed recovery.

exercises.name: Hamstring Stretch
exercises.instructions: Sit or stand and reach toward toes. Hold a gentle stretch without bouncing.

exercises.name: Quad Stretch
exercises.instructions: Stand on one leg, pull heel toward glute. Keep knees together and hips forward.

exercises.name: Child's Pose
exercises.instructions: Kneel and sit back on heels, arms extended forward. Breathe deeply and relax.

exercises.name: Shoulder Stretch
exercises.instructions: Pull one arm across chest using opposite hand. Hold and switch sides.

workouts.name: Total Body Advanced
workouts.description: Challenging full body circuit for experienced users seeking a serious burn.

exercises.name: Burpee Push Up
exercises.instructions: Perform a burpee with a push up at the bottom. Move explosively but with good form.

exercises.name: Pike Push Up
exercises.instructions: Hips high in inverted V. Bend elbows to lower head toward floor, then press up.

exercises.name: Single Leg Glute Bridge
exercises.instructions: One foot on floor, other leg extended. Drive hips up using one glute, switch halfway.

exercises.name: V-Up
exercises.instructions: Lie flat, simultaneously lift legs and torso to touch toes. Lower with control.

exercises.name: Plank to Push Up
exercises.instructions: Start in forearm plank. Press up to hands one arm at a time, then lower back down.
